data.body: S4 (6673) design pinned: (1) jira factory constructs AcliClient via resolve_jira_settings(project_default='DIG') [safe superset]; (2) applier/fetcher _load_acli() return select_backend(load_config()).transport (a TicketTransport) directly, call sites drop their own AcliClient() construction; (3) run_differs:403 + _attestation build_acli_client_from_env route through backend transport; (4) apply_handlers:181 'except ctx.acli.AssigneeNotFoundError' -> direct 'from rebar_reconciler.acli_subprocess import AssigneeNotFoundError'; (5) apply_inbound_records:70,74 provider 'jira' literals -> backend.vendor (leave :156 validate_creation_channel vocabulary key); (6) relocate outbound_links._RELATION_TO_JIRA_LINK + ADF-sizing/value-maps into adapters/jira single-source; (7) migrate ~34 _load_acli test doubles from module-shaped to transport-shaped. Oracle=full reconcile suite stays GREEN + new neutrality grep-gate. Dispatching implementation subagent.
